etymology.description: 止(foot) + 舟(boat) = foot on boat moving forward -> phonetically borrowed for 剪 to mean cut
etymology.interpretation: The character 歬 is an ancient form of 前 (qián, "forward") and originally depicted a foot on a boat, symbolizing movement forward. It served as the phonetic element in 剪 (jiǎn, "to cut"), where an additional 刀 (dāo, "knife") was added.
